title: spilanthes americana
intro: Spilanthes americana, also known as American Spilanthes or Toothache Plant, is a perennial herb native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Spilanthes americana include relief from toothaches, gum inflammation, and mouth ulcers, as well as its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and boost the immune system. The herbal preparations of Spilanthes americana include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed orally or used topically to benefit from its medicinal properties.
